creator: sanpei@yy.cs.keio.ac.jp
text:
xterm had xauthority problem. 

From 3.3.1/untarred/xc/programs/Xserver/hw/xfree86/CHANGELOG
 * 127. Fix for setuid-root xterm problem reading .Xauthority file on
 *      nfs-mounted filesystem (so far only for systems with POSIX_SAVED_IDS)
 *      (Christos Zoulas).

	ja-kterm, xterm that speaks Japanese still also has this problem.

	Plase add some patch as below to kterm in ports collection.

Thank you.

Yoshiro MIHIRA
